title: Botswana National Sports Commission: Subsidiary Legislation [previously Known As "botswana National Sports Council"]
title_en: Botswana National Sports Commission: Subsidiary Legislation [previously Known As "botswana National Sports Council"]

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Botswana National Sports Council (Membership of Council) Order.

provisions.title: Membership of Council
provisions.content:
2. Membership of Council
The Botswana National Football Association shall become affiliated to and become a member of the Council.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Botswana National Football Association (Membership Direction) Order.

provisions.title: Certain clubs to become members of Botswana National Football Association
provisions.content:
2. Certain clubs to become members of Botswana National Football Association
The clubs specified in the Schedule shall become members of the Botswana National Football Association.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Dissolution of the Executive Committee of the Botswana Amateur Boxing Association Order.

provisions.title: Dissolution of executive committee of Botswana Amateur Boxing Association
provisions.content:
2. Dissolution of executive committee of Botswana Amateur Boxing Association
The Executive Committee of the Botswana Amateur Boxing Association is hereby dissolved.

provisions.title: Vesting of functions of executive committee in interim committee
provisions.content:
3. Vesting of functions of executive committee in interim committee
All the functions of the Executive Committee of the Botswana Amateur Boxing Association are hereby vested in the Interim Committee appointed by the Minister in accordance with the provisions of section 18(3) of the Botswana National Sports Council Act.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Dissolution of the Executive Committee of the Botswana Gymnastics Federation Order.

provisions.title: Dissolution of Executive Committee of Botswana Gymnastics Federation
provisions.content:
2. Dissolution of Executive Committee of Botswana Gymnastics Federation
The Executive Committee of the Botswana Gymnastics Federation is hereby dissolved.

provisions.title: Vesting of functions of Executive Committee in interim committee
provisions.content:
3. Vesting of functions of Executive Committee in interim committee
All the functions of the Executive Committee of the Botswana Gymnastics Federation are hereby vested in the interim committee appointed by the Minister in accordance with the provisions of section 18(3) of the Botswana National Sports Council Act (Cap. 60:01).
